Text.Page:
Hundreds of Kaidun's old troops and mercenaries remain on Suryati's Peak, driven mad by the argons' mind control devices.

They're a threat...and they're suffering horribly.

Go through the {@linkcreature:73#1501#teleportal} at the boneyard and put them down.
Every time you come back, I hope this will be the last bag of personal effects I have to identify, but I know it won't be. Thank you for doing thankless work.
It's gut-wrenching to think how many of Kaidun's soldiers still wander mindlessly up on that mountain.
